_meta.description: State home-services cost index vs national average (1.00 = US average).
_meta.usage: Multiply $/sqft and Angi observed-spend legs; blend with % of price so high list prices (e.g. CA land) are not double-counted.
sources: Industry home-service cost indexes (CA ~115 / +15% vs national)
BLS OEWS construction & installation wage ratios used as a cross-check for relative ranking
Angi 2024 State of Home Spending: maintenance $1750 + emergency $978 national baseline
_meta.notes: Not a contractor quote. Prefer Manual override when the buyer has better info.
